future_command_candidate.name: diagnostics history --json
future_command_candidate.notes: Future command contract placeholder only; no UI wiring or allowlist change in this contour.

state_matrix.input_condition: status=ok and packet is fresh and redaction passed
state_matrix.allowed_claim: History packet is fresh and parsed.

state_matrix.input_condition: status=empty with valid schema and redaction
state_matrix.allowed_claim: No bounded history records are available in the requested window.

state_matrix.input_condition: status=stale or observed_at + ttl_seconds is expired
state_matrix.allowed_claim: History packet is stale and requires refresh.
state_matrix.forbidden_claim: Previous healthy data is still current.

state_matrix.input_condition: status=unavailable or command-owned surface is absent
stdout is not exactly one valid JSON object
critical packet fields are absent or malformed
future command does not return within bounded timeout
state_matrix.allowed_claim: History request timed out and may be retried.

state_matrix.input_condition: command runner or packet bridge fails
state_matrix.forbidden_claim: Cached or fixture history can replace packet truth.

state_matrix.input_condition: packet includes forbidden raw paths, logs, secrets, argv, stack traces, or bundle contents
state_matrix.allowed_claim: Packet must be rejected before rendering details.
state_matrix.forbidden_claim: Sensitive fields can be displayed after truncation.

freshness_rules.ok_status_scope: packet parsed, fresh, and redacted; not runtime health

stop_conditions: UI needs direct state or log reads
command adapter or allowlist must change in this contour
chart would present fixture data as live truth
raw paths, secrets, argv, stack traces, or bundle contents appear in packet
